home.description: I'm Lorenzo, a programmer and 3D artist. I'm studying computer engineering in Cagliari.
home.textHighlight1: Collection of artworks created in Blender for the challenge, one render a day for 36 days.
home.textHighlight2: Python script that implements a visual interface for the 'game of life' using the pygame library.

projects.title: Projects
projects.textVueTodolist: A simple todo list app built with Vue.js.
projects.textTilemapGenerationWFC: Implementation of the WFC algorithm for procedural tilemap generation.
projects.textLeagueOfLegendsRandomizer: Random build generator for League of Legends champions.
projects.textAdventOfCode2015: Python solutions to Advent of Code 2015 challenges.
projects.textWaveFunctionCollapse: JavaScript and Python implementations of the wave function collapse algorithm for procedural pattern generation, including a backtracking-enhanced version in Python.
projects.textGameOfLife: Python script that implements a visual interface for the 'game of life' using the pygame library.
projects.text36DaysBlender: Collection of artworks created in Blender for the challenge, one render a day for 36 days.
projects.textBlenderPortfolio: Collection of artworks created over the years.
